search.title: Search Error
search.description: Please try again or contact support if the problem persists
search.noResultsSubtext: Try using different keywords or check your spelling
search.tryAgain: Please try again with different search terms or check your internet connection

network.title: Network Error
network.message: Unable to connect to the server
network.description: Please check your internet connection and try again

api.title: API Error
api.description: The WHO ICD-11 service is currently unavailable. Please try again later
api.rateLimit: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again
api.whoApiUnavailable: The ICD-11 search service is temporarily unavailable due to a configuration issue. Please contact your system administrator.
api.whoApiCredentials: ICD-11 service configuration error. Please contact your system administrator to verify API credentials.
api.whoApiRateLimit: Search rate limit exceeded. Please wait a moment and try again.
api.whoApiTimeout: The search service is taking longer than expected. Please try again.
api.whoApiNetwork: Unable to connect to the ICD-11 search service. Please check your internet connection.

validation.maxLength: Must be no more than {{max}} characters
